questionHtml:
Which factor does not affect the colour of a complex ion?

A.  temperature of the solution

B.  identity of the ligand

C.  identity of the metal

D.  oxidation number of the metal

meta.title: Which factor does not affect the colour of a complex ion? A. temperature of the solution B. identity of the ligand C. identity of the metal D. oxidation number of the metal
